qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Tutor hour creation persists records for unassigned students
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets POST /tutoring/:tutorSubjectId/hours and an insert-before-validation flaw in routes/tutoring/hours/post_hour.go, not the advisory's missing c.Abort() in middlewares/admin.go guarding /admin routes.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory's admin-middleware authorization bypass root cause.
evidence: The advisory states commit 15ae474 fixed middlewares/admin.go by adding c.Abort() after Unauthorized and Forbidden errors so non-admin requests stop before reaching /admin handlers.
The application wires /admin routes through router.Group("/admin", userMiddleware, adminMiddleware), so the advisory root cause is middleware chain continuation on admin endpoints.

The only qualifying finding instead describes routes/tutoring/hours/post_hour.go, where database.Create(&hour) persists a tutor_hours row before the handler checks for a matching tutee_registrations row for POST /tutoring/:tutorSubjectId/hours.
